classification: CUSTOMER URL STABILITY REPORT — End-to-End Accessibility Analysis

incident_summary.symptom: Stage 5.8.1b canary fails 10/10 HTTP 404 on every pipeline run
incident_summary.internal_state: Reports exist on disk (Stage 5.4.1 passes 0 missing), deployed via Pages
incident_summary.contradiction: Files are deployed but URLs return 404
incident_summary.root_cause: CDN propagation time (2-5 minutes) exceeds canary wait (30s) — URLs are served 404 during canary window, resolve to 200 after propagation
incident_summary.customer_impact: Canary hard-fail causes pipeline alarm but customers who wait 5+ minutes see HTTP 200 — EXCEPT for cases where reports were never deployed to gh-pages in prior runs
incident_summary.compounding_factor: Previous deployment of some report IDs may have been missed due to folder: . rsync non-determinism

url_architecture_audit.url_immutability: GUARANTEED — report_url never changes after creation
url_architecture_audit.url_routing: GitHub Pages (custom domain) → Cloudflare CDN → gh-pages branch

pre_fix_url_stability.false_positive_failures_per_run: 10/10 (all sampled URLs fail canary every run)
pre_fix_url_stability.actual_customer_accessibility: UNKNOWN — canary fails before CDN ready; URLs may resolve after delay

feed_json_corruption.effect: json.loads() raises JSONDecodeError — canary falls through to empty URL list and exits 0
feed_json_corruption.net_result: Canary silently skips validation when feed.json is corrupt

post_fix_url_stability.feed_json_corruption_guard: null-byte stripping applied before JSON parsing

step_1_pre_deploy.check: All manifest report_url paths exist on disk

step_2_dist_build.check: All report_url paths exist in dist/

step_3_dist_verify.check: All manifest files in dist/ with correct checksums
step_3_dist_verify.action: HARD FAIL if any check fails

step_4_deploy.action: Deploy dist/ to gh-pages (clean: true, deterministic)

step_5_post_deploy.check: HTTP 200 for sampled report URLs after 300s CDN wait
step_5_post_deploy.action: HARD FAIL if any URL returns non-200

url_continuity_guarantees_post_fix.zero_missing_ctas: Dashboard injects CTAs from API feed (immutable architecture)
url_continuity_guarantees_post_fix.zero_customer_404s: dist/ always contains ALL reports; canary validates HTTP 200
url_continuity_guarantees_post_fix.historical_url_stability: All historical reports in dist/reports/ every run
url_continuity_guarantees_post_fix.url_immutability: report_url never changes after generation (God Mode protects existing)

customer_validation_checklist_v155.expected: Reports generated or God Mode skipped (all exist)
Push to origin/main with all reports committed
All View Report CTAs return HTTP 200
